title: #AIS: Divvy Homes CEO Adena Hefets breaks down the state of the US housing market
description:
This talk was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami and included slides. To watch on YouTube, check out our All-In Summit playlist: https://bit.ly/aisytplaylist

0:00 Adena Hefets breaks down the state of the US housing market in 2022

16:56 Bestie Q&A with Adena: differences between 2008 and 2022, housing market reaction time, chances of a collapse, and more

30:08 Adena does a Bestie Intro for herself!

analysis.summary: Adena Hefets, CEO of Divvy Homes, discusses the state of the US housing market in 2022, comparing it to 2008 and sharing her insights on the market's reaction time and potential for collapse. The conversation also includes a Q&A session and a personal introduction. The episode was recorded live at the All-In Summit in Miami.

takeaways.text: US housing market is different from 2008
Housing market reaction time is slower
Collapse chances are lower due to regulations
Adena Hefets is CEO of Divvy Homes
US housing market is still growing

sentiment.notes: The conversation is informative and Adena Hefets provides a positive outlook on the US housing market, citing improvements in regulations since 2008.

notable_moments.description: Adena Hefets introduces herself and starts discussing the US housing market
Q&A session with Adena Hefets starts
Adena Hefets does a personal introduction
